title: PostgreSQL Compatibility Test Suite Architecture
description: I'm planning the structure of the new `/test-suite` folder. Please choose the preferred implementation approach for the test harness.

questions.question: Which language should we use for the test harness (the script that runs SQL files and compares results)?

options.label: Python (using pytest + psycopg2)
options.description: Flexible, easy to write diffing logic, good reporting. Consistent with existing E2E tests.

options.label: Rust (using tokio-postgres)
options.description: Fast, consistent with the main project language. Can reuse internal logic if needed.

options.label: Shell (using psql + diff)
options.description: Classic PostgreSQL approach. Best for comparing large output files.
